Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
MVP Arena
Albany, NY
Previous Names:
Knickerbocker Arena (Changed after 1996)
Pepsi Arena (Changed after 2006)
Times Union Center (Changed after 2021)
Seating Capacity: 17500
Venue Type : Indoor Arena

Total Gigs: 6
  DMB  (6)

Longest Performance:
12.05.18 - Crush (16:32)
Venue Picture
Description
Groundbreaking for the $68.8 million Knickerbocker Civic Center took place on February 5, 1987. The grand opening of the center, on January 30, 1990, featured a performance by Frank Sinatra. The Knickerbocker was renamed Pepsi Arena in November of 1996, and then Times Union Center in January of 2007.

51 S. Pearl St.
Albany, NY 12207
